calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Clifford Y. Wang, Esq., appearing for Petitioner, Mother Xiao Dong Huang present in court.
Petitioner Sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from LiNa Liang to Annabelle YiNa Liang; and Minor Yiting Liang to Lilibelle YiTing Liang.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Reset To Mar-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
